\tzpentry{ID5713}{Berry Phase}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5713 introduces Berry Phase as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \gamma = \frac{L}{\mu} = \frac{mvr}{qvr/2} = \frac{2m}{q} \end{equation}
